remember: Students will be able to recall the concept of test and measurement in sports.
Students will be able to identify the importance of measurement in sports.
Students will be able to list the different types of measurement tools used in sports.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of test and measurement in sports.
Students will be able to describe the process of measurement in sports.
Students will be able to discuss the role of measurement in improving sports performance.
apply: Students will be able to apply measurement tools and techniques to evaluate sports performance.
Students will be able to use statistical methods to analyze sports data.
Students will be able to design and conduct experiments to measure sports performance.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between measurement and sports performance.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different measurement tools and techniques.
Students will be able to identify the limitations of measurement in sports and suggest improvements.

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of measurement in sports.
To learn the different types of measurement tools and techniques used in sports.
To analyze the role of measurement in improving sports performance.
board_exam_objectives: To evaluate the effectiveness of different measurement tools and techniques in sports.
To analyze the relationship between measurement and sports performance.
To explain the concept of test and measurement in sports.
